routing-config.md
Removed in ddx-3bd7396a. profile_ladders, model_overrides, default_harness are hard-rejected at config load.

package config

import (
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"testing"

	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
)

// TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnDefaultHarness covers AC #1 of bead
// ddx-87fb72c2: a config carrying agent.routing.default_harness must
// fail to load with a migration message. The CLI surfaces the error to
// the user; the loader's exit code is non-zero (the *cobra.Command path
// returns the error to its caller).
func TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnDefaultHarness(t *testing.T) {
	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	ddxDir := filepath.Join(tempDir, ".ddx")
	require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(ddxDir, 0755))
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(ddxDir, "config.yaml"), []byte(`version: "1.0"
library:
  path: "./library"
  repository:
    url: "https://github.com/test/repo"
    branch: "main"
agent:
  routing:
    default_harness: claude
`), 0644))

	_, err := LoadWithWorkingDir(tempDir)
	require.Error(t, err, "loading must fail when agent.routing.default_harness is present")

	migErr, ok := err.(*RoutingMigrationError)
	require.True(t, ok, "expected RoutingMigrationError, got %T: %v", err, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "agent.routing.default_harness", migErr.Field)

	msg := err.Error()
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "agent.routing.default_harness")
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "removed")
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "docs/migrations/routing-config.md")
}

// TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnProfileLadders covers bead ddx-3bd7396a:
// a config carrying agent.routing.profile_ladders must fail to load.
func TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnProfileLadders(t *testing.T) {
	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	ddxDir := filepath.Join(tempDir, ".ddx")
	require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(ddxDir, 0755))
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(ddxDir, "config.yaml"), []byte(`version: "1.0"
library:
  path: "./library"
  repository:
    url: "https://github.com/test/repo"
    branch: "main"
agent:
  routing:
    profile_ladders:
      default: [cheap, standard, smart]
`), 0644))

	_, err := LoadWithWorkingDir(tempDir)
	require.Error(t, err, "loading must fail when agent.routing.profile_ladders is present")

	migErr, ok := err.(*RoutingMigrationError)
	require.True(t, ok, "expected RoutingMigrationError, got %T: %v", err, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "agent.routing.profile_ladders", migErr.Field)

	msg := err.Error()
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "agent.routing.profile_ladders")
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "removed")
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "docs/migrations/routing-config.md")
}

// TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnModelOverrides covers bead ddx-3bd7396a:
// a config carrying agent.routing.model_overrides must fail to load.
func TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnModelOverrides(t *testing.T) {
	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	ddxDir := filepath.Join(tempDir, ".ddx")
	require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(ddxDir, 0755))
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(ddxDir, "config.yaml"), []byte(`version: "1.0"
library:
  path: "./library"
  repository:
    url: "https://github.com/test/repo"
    branch: "main"
agent:
  routing:
    model_overrides:
      cheap: qwen/qwen3.6
`), 0644))

	_, err := LoadWithWorkingDir(tempDir)
	require.Error(t, err, "loading must fail when agent.routing.model_overrides is present")

	migErr, ok := err.(*RoutingMigrationError)
	require.True(t, ok, "expected RoutingMigrationError, got %T: %v", err, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "agent.routing.model_overrides", migErr.Field)

	msg := err.Error()
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "agent.routing.model_overrides")
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "removed")
	assert.Contains(t, msg, "docs/migrations/routing-config.md")
}

data.text:
All 5 AC items are already satisfied on base-rev `b7728cce`:

1. `cli/internal/config/routing_migration_test.go::TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnDefaultHarness` — passes
2. `TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnProfileLadders` and `TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnModelOverrides` — pass (stricter hard-error path was adopted in ddx-3bd7396a)
3. `cli/internal/config/schema/config.schema.json` contains no references to `default_harness` / `profile_ladders` / `model_overrides`; `types.go:255-257` documents removal
4. `CHANGELOG.md` lines 7-33 — Breaking changes section with both removal entries pointing at the migration doc
5. `docs/migrations/routing-config.md` exists

Working tree is clean. The bead's REVIEW:BLOCK note flagged the previous *attempt's* diff (only execution evidence), but the actual implementation has since been merged to the base branch. There is no code to add.

input.content:
Bead ddx-87fb72c2 — no changes required.

What is done:
All 5 AC items are already satisfied on base-rev b7728cce, which is the
checkpoint of this execution worktree:

  AC1 (default_harness hard error):
    cli/internal/config/config.go RoutingMigrationError + rejection loop
    cli/internal/config/routing_migration_test.go::TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnDefaultHarness — passes

  AC2 (profile_ladders + model_overrides):
    Adopted stricter stance in follow-up bead ddx-3bd7396a — both fields
    are hard-rejected at config load rather than warned about. Tests
    TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnProfileLadders and
    TestLoadConfigHardErrorsOnModelOverrides cover this and pass.

  AC3 (schema): default_harness / profile_ladders / model_overrides are
    absent from cli/internal/config/schema/config.schema.json and from
    the Go config struct. types.go:255-257 documents the removal.

  AC4 (CHANGELOG): CHANGELOG.md lines 7-33 — "Breaking changes" section
    contains "Removed: agent.routing.default_harness" and
    "Removed: agent.routing.profile_ladders and agent.routing.model_overrides",
    each pointing at docs/migrations/routing-config.md.

  AC5 (migration guide): docs/migrations/routing-config.md exists.

Verification: cd cli && go test ./internal/config/ — PASS.

Why no commit:
The REVIEW:BLOCK note on this bead concerns the *previous attempt's*
diff, which contained only .ddx/executions evidence. The implementation
has since been merged to the base branch, so the working tree is clean
and there is no code, schema, doc, or CHANGELOG change left to make.
A commit would be empty / cosmetic.

What a follow-up attempt would need:
Nothing for AC fulfillment. If the reviewer wants the original AC2
behavior (warn-on-load, opt-in via --escalate / --override-model)
instead of the stricter hard-reject path that ddx-3bd7396a adopted,
that is a scope reversal and should be filed as a new bead — it is not
implementable inside this bead without contradicting ddx-3bd7396a.

data.text: No commit needed. All 5 AC items are already satisfied on base-rev b7728cce (config hard-errors on `default_harness` with `RoutingMigrationError`, tests in `routing_migration_test.go` pass, schema is clean, CHANGELOG has the Breaking-changes entry, `docs/migrations/routing-config.md` exists). Wrote `no_changes_rationale.txt` explaining why this iteration produces no diff — the prior REVIEW:BLOCK was about a previous attempt's empty diff; the implementation has since landed on base.
